Rotation Planner

A free digital tool for gymnastics clubs. Build your weekly session schedule once, then display it live on any screen in your gym. The planner automatically detects the current time and day — as the session progresses, the display moves in real time so coaches and gymnasts always know exactly where they should be.

👤 Club Profile

Update your club details. These are visible to NGL administrators.

✏ Edit Club Profile

Copy Rotation Block

Duplicate this group's full rotation block to one or more new start times, keeping the same gaps between sessions.

Import Data for Club

Paste JSON data exported from another planner. This will overwrite the club's existing data.

📡

Your Live Streaming Link

Share this permanent link with parents, coaches or anyone who wants to follow the session live on their device. The link never changes.

📱 Works on any phone or tablet — no login needed
